title: Email Newsletter for a Subscription Service
scenario: Write an email newsletter for a subscription-based meal kit service. The newsletter should be 200-250 words, include information about new recipes, and encourage subscribers to try new dishes.
constraints: Must include information about new recipes and dishes.
Must include a CTA to encourage subscribers to try new dishes.
Must be written in a conversational tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the information about new recipes accurate and relevant?
Is the tone conversational and engaging?
Is the CTA clear and effective?
